rationale.hitl-workflow: AI supports review while humans retain approval, rejection, and revision decisions.
rationale.ai-review: Specialized agents identify defects, improvements, alternatives, and suggested review comments.
rationale.risk-routing: Platform helps select changes and adapts review depth to user constraints.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Agents consolidate rationale, context, documentation, and recommendations for reviewers.
rationale.intro-framing: Vision paper argues AI should support rather than replace human review.
rationale.framework: Proposes an integratable agent-based architecture for adaptive code-review workflows.
